pain_points.pain_desc: After accepting urgent orders, manual rescheduling takes hours and disrupts other orders, causing floor chaos.
pain_points.solution_desc: Full-plant reschedule within 5 minutes of rush order insertion. Displays impact scope, auto-negotiates delivery dates, manager approves with one click.

pain_points.pain_desc: Production plans ignore material arrival timing, causing frequent 'machine waiting for material' or 'material arrived with no machine available' situations.
pain_points.solution_desc: APS integrates ERP/WMS material data — only schedules work orders where material, machine, and labor are all available, eliminating waiting waste.

pain_points.pain_desc: No systematic changeover management, similar parts not grouped in scheduling, losing over 2 hours of utilization per day to changeovers.
pain_points.solution_desc: Auto-groups by tooling, color, and material similarity to minimize changeovers. Average changeover time reduced by 60%.

features.title: Finite-Capacity Scheduling Engine
features.short: Generates executable schedules considering machine, labor, and tooling constraints
features.detail:
Traditional ERP 'infinite capacity' scheduling often results in plans that can't be executed. APS finite-capacity engine integrates:

• Machine availability windows and maintenance plans
• Operator shift schedules and skill matrices
• Tooling lifespan and cleaning cycles
• Material arrival dates and inventory levels

Using multi-objective optimization (genetic algorithm + local search), it generates optimal schedules balancing due dates, utilization, and inventory within minutes — visualized as interactive Gantt charts.

features.title: Tooling Assignment Optimization
features.short: Auto-matches tools to work orders to extend tool life and reduce changeover cost
features.detail:
Tooling management is a core pain point in precision manufacturing. APS tooling assignment module:

• Tracks cumulative usage count and remaining lifespan for each tool
• Auto-filters qualified tools by product specifications
• Prioritizes tools approaching maintenance thresholds to avoid scrapping
• Calculates cross-order tool transfer paths to minimize idle waiting
• Integrates maintenance scheduling to ensure tooling maintenance doesn't conflict with production

features.title: Changeover Sequence Optimization
features.short: Similarity-based grouping to drastically compress changeover losses
features.detail:
Changeover optimization uses a 'similarity matrix' algorithm:

• Calculates similarity scores across material, color, dimension, and tooling dimensions
• Solves shortest changeover path using Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP)
• Supports industry conventions like 'light to dark color ordering'
• Graphical changeover Gantt for floor staff confirmation
• Feedback loop: records actual changeover times to continuously refine prediction model

features.title: Multi-Plant / Multi-Line Coordination
features.short: Cross-plant order distribution to balance capacity and inventory across facilities
features.detail:
Group manufacturers often face uneven order distribution across plants. APS multi-plant coordination module:

• Creates a group-level capacity view showing utilization across all plants
• Auto-assigns orders to optimal facilities based on process capability, transport cost, and due dates
• Inter-plant WIP transfer planning and tracking
• Consolidated purchasing material demand aggregation to reduce fragmented procurement cost
• Bi-directional sync between Master Production Schedule (MPS) and plant-level MES

features.title: Decision Analytics Dashboard
features.short: Real-time KPI monitoring, schedule simulation, and fast decision support
features.detail:
The APS dashboard doesn't just display data — it provides decision recommendations:

• Due date risk alerts: flags orders likely to be late 3 days in advance
• Capacity heat map: visually shows machine load by time slot
• Schedule scenario simulator: compare 'shortest lead time' vs 'highest utilization' strategies
• Schedule stability score: quantifies resistance to disruption by rush orders
• One-click export of customer delivery confirmation letters and internal production plans

features.title: Materials Sync Planning
features.short: ERP/WMS integration to ensure scheduling only starts when all three resources are ready
features.detail:
'Material without machine, machine without material' is the biggest waste in manufacturing. APS materials sync engine:

• Real-time read of expected arrival dates from ERP purchase orders
• Calculates earliest available time for materials needed per work order
• Auto-pushes schedule start time forward to ensure materials are ready at job start
• Safety stock buffer configuration to handle supplier delay risk
• Material shortage alerts: notifies procurement to expedite before shortages occur

cases.challenge: Sales frequently accepted urgent orders. Manual rescheduling took over 4 hours and often caused delays on other orders, resulting in constant customer complaints.
cases.result: After APS deployment, rush order rescheduling dropped to 5 minutes. On-time delivery rate rose from 72% to 97%, greatly boosting sales confidence.

cases.challenge: No systematic tooling changeover management. Daily changeover losses exceeded 2 hours of utilization. WIP buildup caused capital lock-up and space shortages.
cases.result: After changeover sequence optimization, average changeover time reduced by 58%. Utilization rose from 61% to 84%. WIP inventory reduced by 40%.
